items.text: R to @nvidia: Super agents have arrived on the desktop. With local AI, designers and engineers can build, customize and run domain-specific agents using their own data and workflows. NVIDIA NemoClaw on DGX Station brings together Nemotron 3 Ultra, Omniverse libraries and OpenShell in an open agent stack. 🔗 https://nvda.ws/4h2mcYH #SIGGRAPH2026
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: Markets obsess with margin % and market share and often penalize companies that exponentially increase margin and revenue dollars. Great case and point has been $NVDA. Both revenue and margin dollars have exploded with overall market growth and execution but many pundits obsess over 75% margins declining or 96% market share eroding even as the market grows to multiple trillions annually. 😐
items.author: @danielnewmanUV

items.text: R to @nvidia: Frontier world models now run on edge GPUs. ⚡ Now openly available, NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge brings advanced world-model capabilities to local devices. The 4-billion-parameter omnimodel can understand and generate text, image, video, ambient sound and action for physical AI across robotics, autonomous vehicles and smart infrastructure. 🔗 https://nvda.ws/3RGxNCc #SIGGRAPH2026
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: R to @nvidia: NVIDIA’s research isn’t just focused on creating worlds that look real — but that behave realistically and respond in real time. Whether the output is a game, film, robot or factory digital twin, the goal is the same: expand the canvas of creativity with AI-generated worlds that are grounded in 3D, governed by physics and directed by creators. 🔗 https://nvda.ws/3TbQLkD #SIGGRAPH2026
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: GeForce Summer Nights GPU Reveal: 007 First Light Recruits, your prize has entered the field: A custom GeForce RTX 5080 Founders Edition inspired by Bond Want it? 🟢 Comment #RTXPowersPlay 🟢 Watch @GeForce_JacobF LIVE during our 007: First Light takeover 🗓️ 7/24 | ⏰ 1-3 PM PT

items.text: R to @NVIDIAAI: As always, Cosmos 3 Edge is fully open. This includes model weights, post-training recipes and code. Available now on @huggingface 🤗 https://nvda.ws/4bMtY59
items.author: @NVIDIAAI

items.text: R to @NVIDIAAI: Among open models of a similar size, Cosmos 3 Edge ranks #1 on VANTAGE-Bench for vision analytics.
items.author: @NVIDIAAI

items.text: R to @NVIDIAAI: Cosmos 3 Edge combines autoregressive and diffusion transformer towers through shared multimodal attention, connecting understanding, prediction, simulation and action in one model. You can find a full technical breakdown of Cosmos 3 Edge below. https://nvda.ws/3RoJNIj
items.author: @NVIDIAAI

items.text: Introducing Cosmos 3 Edge: our open frontier world model built to run on-device. Cosmos 3 Edge helps robots learn and act, autonomous vehicles understand road scenes and predict intent, and vision AI agents reason across live video for smart infrastructure. With 4B parameters and a 2B Nemotron-based reasoner, you can run it on DGX Spark, NVIDIA Jetson, and more.
items.author: @NVIDIAAI

items.text: R to @nvidia: As AI-generated content becomes more prevalent, media organizations need trusted tools to help verify video at the speed of production. Built on the NVIDIA AI for Media platform, the Synthetic Video Detector NVIDIA NIM microservice helps broadcasters, publishers, and content teams strengthen content authenticity across modern media workflows. 🔗 https://nvda.ws/4fl9sK5 #SIGGRAPH2026
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: R to @nvidia: Leading creative applications are opening Model Context Protocol connections that let AI agents work inside the tools where scenes, shots, timelines, assets and edits come to life — while creators stay in control. MCP is opening the next chapter of accelerated creativity: applications aren’t just getting faster. They’re becoming agent-ready. 🔗 https://nvda.ws/4pmRxqQ #SIGGRAPH2026
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: Announced at #SIGGRAPH2026 📣 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit now includes Omniverse libraries, giving AI agents tools and skills to help developers integrate physical AI capabilities into their existing 3D applications. Read the full release: https://nvda.ws/4wQlPVu
items.author: @nvidianewsroom

items.text: RT by @nvidia: Want to put AI agents to work building simulation-ready worlds? 👀 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit now includes Omniverse libraries, giving AI agents the tools to help developers integrate physical AI capabilities into their existing 3D applications. Want to learn more? Read the full #SIGGRAPH2026 press release → https://nvda.ws/4wTHFri

items.text: Agents are becoming specialized, using reinforcement learning post-training to develop domain-specific skills 🛠️ Every post-training rollout is an inference call, so a lower cost per token flows straight into a higher Intelligence per Dollar on every run. That is what the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform is built for: extreme co-design that drives Cost per Token down and Intelligence per Dollar up, on every run of agentic post-training.
items.author: @nvidia

items.author: @nvidia

items.text: Another leaderboard win for Nemotron 3 Embed 👀 The 8B model takes #1 on LMEB, with the 1B model right behind it at #2. LMEB tests whether embedding models can find the right details across long-running conversations and other memory-heavy tasks, useful for agents that need to remember context across sessions.
